title: ATS Job Record
description: Structured fields extracted from a single raw job description. The four agents each emit exactly this object; the judge scores it field-by-field against the gold record.

company.description: Hiring company; null if not stated.

location.description: Stated location/region (e.g. 'United States'); null if not stated.

salary_min.description: Annualized USD lower bound; null if no pay stated.

salary_max.description: Annualized USD upper bound; null if no pay stated.

salary_currency.description: ISO-ish currency code, e.g. 'USD'; null if no pay stated.

years_experience_min.description: Minimum years of experience as an explicit number; null if not a hard number.

apply_url.description: Application URL if present IN THE JD TEXT; null otherwise (do not invent).
